summary: Completed comprehensive frontend-only testing of SciPost Pairwise synchronization implementation. All requested features are working correctly - validation hub navigation works, both Abstract and Extract pages load with the new methodology sync note, and no UI regressions detected in gap charts or performance charts.
passed_tests: SciPost (Abstract) page loads successfully with methodology sync note
SciPost (Extract) page loads successfully with methodology sync note
Methodology sync note displays correctly: 'Pair sync: Abstract and Extract modes use identical paper pairs for head-to-head comparison'
Gap charts render correctly in both Abstract and Extract modes
Performance charts render correctly in both Abstract and Extract modes
Navigation between Abstract/Extract modes works smoothly
Mode-specific content displays appropriately (PDF extraction vs abstract-only)
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
Status cards display correctly in both modes
Overall majority agreement sections render properly
Agreement by dimension charts work correctly
All sidebar navigation items (Qeios, SciPost single-item) work correctly
